title: Overflow

sections.label: Intro
lines: Sing a new song, let the heavens sway,
Feel the rhythm, let your heart obey.
Glory awakens, the dawn is near,
Raise your voice, let the world hear.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Dance in the joy of a holy light,
The stars are shining in the darkest night.
Every breath a gift, every step divine,
We are the echoes of a higher design.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: With every beat, a story unfolds,
A melody of love that never grows old.
Lift your hands, let the spirit rise,
We’re a choir under endless skies.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Sing it loud, sing it strong,
A song of triumph all night long.
Feel the fire, let it glow,
In the dance of joy, our hearts overflow.
(Overflow, overflow, yeah!)

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Our feet on earth, but our souls take flight,
Boundless freedom in the soft moonlight.
Let your praises echo, let them soar,
We’re alive, forevermore.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Through valleys low, through mountains steep,
The promise of glory is ours to keep.
Let love be the anthem, our guiding flame,
In every heartbeat, we call His name.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Sing it loud, sing it strong,
A song of triumph all night long.
Feel the fire, let it glow,
In the dance of joy, our hearts overflow.
(Overflow, overflow, yeah!)

sections.label: Outro
lines: Sing a new song, let the heavens sway,
Feel the rhythm, let your heart obey.
Raise your voice, let the world hear,
In this song of joy, we’ll persevere.

epigraph: Praise ye the LORD. Sing unto the LORD a new song
